code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{contentService}from'../../services/contentService';import MangaCard from'./MangaCard';import'./PopularManga.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const PopularManga=()=>{const[popularManga,setPopularManga]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[activeTab,setActiveTab]=useState('all');useEffect(()=>{loadPopularManga();},[activeTab]);const loadPopularManga=async()=>{try{setLoading(true);const data=await contentService.getPopularContent();let filteredData=data;if(activeTab==='manga'){filteredData=data.filter(item=>item.type==='Манга');}else if(activeTab==='manhwa'){filteredData=data.filter(item=>item.type==='Манхва');}setPopularManga(filteredData);}catch(error){console.error('Error loading popular manga:',error);}finally{setLoading(false);}};const tabs=[{id:'all',label:'Все',icon:'fa-fire'},{id:'manga',label:'Манга',icon:'fa-book'},{id:'manhwa',label:'Манхва',icon:'fa-flag'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"popular-manga",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"tabs",children:tabs.map(tab=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"tab-btn ".concat(activeTab===tab.id?'active':''),onClick:()=>setActiveTab(tab.id),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas ".concat(tab.icon)}),tab.label]},tab.id))}),loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"loading-grid",children:[1,2,3,4].map(i=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"skeleton-card"},i))}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"manga-grid",children:popularManga.map(manga=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MangaCard,{manga:manga},manga.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"view-more",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"view-more-btn",children:["\u0421\u043C\u043E\u0442\u0440\u0435\u0442\u044C \u0431\u043E\u043B\u044C\u0448\u0435",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-arrow-right"})]})})]});};export default PopularManga;
